title: EIA Regional Hourly JSON API
description:
Hourly regional summary data as reported the EIA-930 dataset. Contains data on Load, Load Forecast, Net Generation, and Net Interchange.

ℹ️ EIA data can be delayed or revised. To avoid missing updates, we:
* Check for new data and revisions throughout the day for the previous 24 hours.
* At 04:00 UTC, recheck the past 30 days for any changes.
In both cases, updates are only applied when the new values are non-null.

⚠️ For the most accurate and up to date ISO/RTO load, generation, and interchange data, we recommend using their respective datasets instead.
